purpose: Trust-building collage of customer reviews, star ratings, UGC screenshots, or testimonial cards arranged in a visually compelling social proof wall composition.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Social proof visual composition template, hero {featured_product} centered in composition, surrounded by 4-6 review card placeholders in {brand_color_palette} — clean rounded cards with five-star rating icons, anonymous customer review text placeholder areas (no real text), satisfaction percentage badge element, {background_descriptor} — clean white or soft gradient background, professional trust-signaling layout, brand-consistent typography blocks (empty), subtle pattern or texture in background, composition balanced and editorial not cluttered, leave card areas blank for text overlay post-generation, shot on 50mm at f/8, no text in image, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: real text in review cards (leave blank for overlay)
Avoid in output: fake or fabricated review content
Avoid in output: cluttered unreadable layout
notes: Intents: harvest. Saudi adaptation guidance: Social proof and peer reviews are highly influential in Saudi purchasing decisions, particularly for beauty and F&B. Min brand maturity 60 days ensures real reviews exist before publishing. Review cards should be left blank by the model and filled with actual reviews post-generation. Arabic star ratings and testimonials should be used for Saudi audience. Reference image: Optional. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per month for established brands. Compliance level: standard.
